instName: ﻿Church of the Holy Infancy of Jesus

instNote: ﻿The Lake Superior Missions, in La Point and Douglas Counties, are placed by the Ordinary of Milwaukee under the more immediate care and jurisdiction of the Bishop of Sault St. Marie, and are regularly visited by pastors of St. Joseph's Church in La Point. The Stations are: Superior City, Fond du Lac, Swamp River, in Douglas Co.
